sections.title: Body & Diseases Vocabulary — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Body & Diseases Vocabulary — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Body & Diseases Vocabulary is an essential building block of English. Formula: Possessive + body part + be-verb/verb (+ pain/condition) | Subject + has + disease. Rules: Body part pain uses 'have + a + ...ache' (headache, stomachache) or 'my ... hurts/is aching' | 'has/have' introduces a disease/condition (He has diabetes / I have a cold) | 'sore throat' and 'high fever' are fixed adjective + noun collocations | 'allergic to' + noun describes an allergy
sections.formula: Possessive + body part + be-verb/verb (+ pain/condition) | Subject + has + disease

examples.hindi: मेरे कान में दर्द हो रहा है।

sections.title: Body & Diseases Vocabulary — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Body & Diseases Vocabulary — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Body & Diseases Vocabulary for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Possessive + body part + be-verb/verb (+ pain/condition) | Subject + has + disease

examples.english: He has a very kind heart.

examples.hindi: मेरा पेट दर्द कर रहा है।
